The description of Local Territory is refined to specify a population range (75,000–100,000) instead of just "(100,000) people", and all references to 'fivethree' and garbled text (e.g., 'Temtory', 'fianohisees', 'ptomote') are cleaned up. The Empire Builder Program remains but is now explicitly described as part of the three-type framework.

rows.summary: The text of Item 12 is substantively identical between the 2022 and 2023 FDDs. All paragraphs, clauses, exceptions, rights, obligations, and conditions regarding protected territory, Area Development Agreement terms, non-exclusive nature, relocation rules, franchisor reservation rights, and right of first refusal are verbatim or near-verbatim matches. Differences are limited to pagination (OLD spans pages 0031–0032; NEW spans 0030–0031), header formatting (e.g., 'WAHOO’S 20222023 FDD (CA)' vs. 'WAHOO’S 2023 FDD'), and minor line breaks — none affecting meaning, rights, or obligations.
